foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Calot's triangle anatomy and cystic artery variations are essential for safe cholecystectomy and understanding biliary drainage

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Gallstones may migrate to cause CBD obstruction; understanding the jaundice workup is essential to guide management

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Cholelithiasis is the commonest cause of acute cholecystitis; the two conditions share a clinical continuum

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Secondary CBD stones originate from gallbladder calculi; concurrent CBD stones must be excluded before cholecystectomy

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Porcelain gallbladder and large gallstones are risk factors for gallbladder carcinoma; incidental cancer is found in ~1% of cholecystectomy specimens

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Acalculous biliary pain with low gallbladder ejection fraction is a differential diagnosis for symptomatic cholelithiasis

integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Cholelithiasis across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
